en: Hey you must be the new designer Yeah hi I'm Alex It's my first day Welcome I'm Rachel I

en: work on the same team Oh great Nice to meet you You too Do you have everything you need to get started

en: I think so Just waiting for IT to finish setting up my laptop

classic means something that happens to a lot of people
ko: classic은 많은 사람에게 일어나는 일이라는 뜻이에요.
